item.title: ARDELL DuraLash Flare Lashes Regular Short Black
item.description: Es gibt ein ARDELL DuraLash Flare Lashes Regular Short Black hier: ℹ️: Einheitenanzahltyp: stück duralash individual lashes are the closest thing to natural lashes ever developed. Anzahl der einheiten: 1.0 available in flare and naturals styles and come in black or brown and short medium and long-lengths. one duralashpackage contains 56 lashes 🛒 kauf es hier!!
